name: demo_full_locomotion
title: Demo: One-Prompt Full Locomotion (T1.B)
description: Reference plan for the T1.B WWZ ignition demo. Builds a complete Bible-aligned locomotion system on the Trooper character: retarget 70 GASP anims, Motion Matching schema + database, IK Rig chains, Linked Rifle layer, Niagara muzzle flash, BPDoctor fix-all. Used as ground truth to check what Bionics emits from the one-prompt demo, and as a fallback plan if the zero-shot emission isn't clean enough to ship.
prerequisites: BionicsBridge + BPDoctor plugins compiled in the target project
Bionics MCP server running with BIONICS_MCP_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE=true
warnings: DESTRUCTIVE tier — batch_retarget writes 70 new assets, MM schema rewrites private arrays.
ABP_Trooper AnimGraph is mutated in place. Back it up before recording a take.
PoseSearch schema requires a plugin rebuild if the Trooper skeleton has new bones added since last compile.

steps.description: Capture a before-state screenshot of the UE5 viewport + Content Browser
Batch-retarget 70 GASP anims from Mannequin skeleton to Trooper skeleton
Create the PoseSearch database asset DB_Locomotion
Populate DB_Locomotion with the 70 retargeted anims via SWPoseSearchHelper

params.script:
import unreal
db = unreal.load_asset('/Game/Locomotion/DB_Locomotion')
helper = unreal.SWPoseSearchHelper()
helper.populate_database(db, '/Game/Characters/Trooper_Anims')

steps.description: Configure MM schema channels: pelvis, ball_l, ball_r, trajectory

params.script:
import unreal
helper = unreal.SWPoseSearchHelper()
schema = helper.create_default_schema('/Game/Locomotion/MM_LocomotionSchema', '/Game/Characters/CH_SciFiTrooper_Man_03_Skeleton')
helper.add_bone_channel(schema, 'pelvis')
helper.add_bone_channel(schema, 'ball_l')
helper.add_bone_channel(schema, 'ball_r')
helper.add_trajectory_channel(schema)
helper.finalize_schema(schema)

steps.description: Create IK Rig for the Trooper skeleton
Add foot IK chains (left + right) with FBIK solver
Add hand IK chains (left + right) for weapon grip
Create Linked Anim Layer for the Rifle weapon (ALI_Combat interface)
Wire the MM node into ABP_Trooper's locomotion state

params.script:
import unreal
helper = unreal.SWPoseSearchHelper()
ok = helper.build_motion_matching_anim_graph('/Game/Animation/ABP_Trooper', '/Game/Locomotion/DB_Locomotion', '/Game/Locomotion/MM_LocomotionSchema')
print(f'MM AnimGraph wired: {ok}')

steps.description: Spawn a muzzle-flash Niagara emitter at the weapon tip
Bind the FireRate User parameter to the weapon tick
Run BPDoctor scan on the finished AnimBP
Auto-fix everything BPDoctor flagged as auto-fixable
